o 4'4'

[...] a-di U₄ [...]

(o 4') [...] until [...] day [...].

o 5'5'

[...] x ŠINIG u₂tar-⸢muš⸣ [...]

(o 5') 5'. You put [...] ... tamarisk, lupin [...] his neck.

o 6'6'

[...] ⸢GU₂?⸣-šu₂ GAR ŠINIG maš-[ti₃ ...]

(o 6') You anoint [...] tamarisk for maštu-disease [...] ... with bowl-oil. [...] napšaštu-ointments [...].

o 7'7'

[...] ḪA RA ina I₃ BUR EŠ nap-⸢šal?⸣-[ti ...]

o 8'8'

[...]-tu₄ ⸢ŠUB?⸣di u₂LU₂a-nu maš-ti₃ ina tug₂GADA x x (x) [...]

(o 8') You pour [...] .... label+ o 8' - o 9' You fumigate it [...] amīlānu-plant for maštu-disease in a linen garment ... [...] ...-wood for maštu-disease. ... [...] amīlānu-plant [...] from [...] day [...].

o 9'9'

[...] x gišx maš-ti₃ SAR-šu₂ u₂LU₂a-nu IŠ x x (x) [...]  ; TA ⸢U₄?⸣ [...]1

o 10'10'

[...] x SIG₇ gišŠE.U₃.SUḪ₅ U₂ ina? IŠ SI NI BI x [...]

(o 10') You put [...] yellow-green ..., (conifer) cone, plant in ... [...] yellow-green ... with a poultice on his neck.

o 11'11'

[...] x SIG₇ KI me-eli ina GU₂-šu₂ GAR gišŠE.U₃.SUḪ₅ SAR [...]

(o 11') You fumigate (conifer) cone. [...] ... from the 1st day until the [...] day [...].

o 12'12'

[...] x x TA U₄ 1-KAM EN U₄ [...]

o 13'13'

[...] U₂ NUMUN GADA ina GU GAD AŠ [...]

(o 13') You put [...] plant, linseed, in ... [...] ... fat ... hair of ... [...] with bowl-oil. [...] from the ... [...] day [...].

o 14'14'

[...] x I₃.UDU x SIG₂ x [...]

o 15'15'

[...] x ina I₃ BUR GAR TA U₄ x-[KAM ...]

o 16'16'

[...] x gišILDAG₂ u₂ak-tam x IŠ [...]

(o 16') You put [...] .... adāru-wood, aktam-plant ... [...] alternatively ... on his neck.

o 17'17'

[...] KI.MIN x ina GU₂-šu₂ GAR gišILDAG₂ [...]

(o 17') You anoint adāru-wood, [...] ... with bowl-oil.

o 18'18'

[...] x x x ⸢ina⸣ I₃ BUR EŠ x x x [...]

(o 18') You put ... [...] [...] ... band ... [...]

[...] x DA NI TU₄ x x (x) kan-nu x [...]

o 20'20'

1TA U₄?# written on the following ruling
